description: Adapter mapping OWNER's prompt-level state names to the V5 pipeline reality (PIPELINE_PHASE_SPEC.md). The V5 phase + per-phase verdict is the runtime authority; this adapter lets dashboards / website / daily-summary speak the OWNER vocabulary without re-spec'ing the framework.
authority: Runtime authority is per-EA phase result JSON under D:/QM/reports/pipeline/<EA>/<phase>/. Adapter is read-only translation for human-facing surfaces.

IDEA_FOUND.note: Research agent surfaced a candidate, no card yet

EA_BUILD_REQUESTED.verdict_when: QB approved card, CEO issued build to Development

SETFILES_CREATED.verdict_when: setfile(s) at framework/EAs/<EA>/sets/ verified by Setfile-Engineer

NEWS_FILTER_STAGE_QUEUED.verdict_when: Decision (2026-05-12): V5 P8 (post-statval mode selection) is the news stage. There is no inter-baseline-sweep news stage.

NEWS_FILTER_STAGE_FAILED.verdict_when: P8 returns no eligible mode (all 7 modes PF<1.0 or 0 trades)

SWEEP_BACKTEST_PASSED.verdict_when: P3 verdict=PASS (>50% combos PF>1.0 + plateau check)

FORWARD_TEST_QUEUED.verdict_when: P4 walk-forward enqueued. Note: V5 also has P3.5 cross-sectional robustness immediately before P4.

FORWARD_TEST_PASSED.verdict_when: P4 verdict=PASS (≥6 anchored folds, dev_end<oos_start embargo, regime labels)

PIPELINE_PASSED.verdict_when: All automated phases through P8 verdict=PASS; aggregate index.json final_verdict=READY

PIPELINE_FAILED.verdict_when: Any required phase verdict=FAIL/INVALID/BLOCKED; aggregate final_verdict=BLOCKED

READY_FOR_LIVE_REVIEW.verdict_when: Pipeline passed AND queued for OWNER P9 portfolio-construction review (manual gate)

LIVE_ELIGIBLE.verdict_when: OWNER passed P9 + P9b operational-readiness sign-off; eligible for P10 burn-in

LIVE_DEPLOYED.verdict_when: EA deployed to T_Live with AutoTrading enabled by OWNER+Board-Advisor (Hard Rule)

REJECTED.verdict_when: OWNER or QB explicitly rejected the EA card / strategy

REVIEW_REQUIRED.verdict_when: aggregate final_verdict=REVIEW_REQUIRED — human judgment needed on a verdict edge case

ARCHIVE_LOCAL_UPDATE_QUEUED.trigger: QM_DashboardRender_Hourly fires (renders strategies.html in same batch)

WEBSITE_PUBLISHED.trigger: public-data/*.json updated AND git push succeeded OR Netlify hook fired

WEBSITE_PUBLISH_SKIPPED.trigger: No diff in any public-data/*.json (idempotent no-op)

notes: OWNER 2026-05-12: V5 P8 stays as the news stage; we do not insert an additional news-robustness stage between P2 (baseline) and P3 (sweep). The 7-mode QM_NewsFilter.mqh + p8_news_driver.py already address news robustness as end-of-automated-pipeline mode selection.
OWNER's WAITING/RUNNING/COMPLETED sub-states map to dispatch_state.json's pending/running/dedup keys for each phase.
P9, P9b, P10 are manual OWNER gates — no automated transition. The orchestrator (phase_orchestrator.py) refuses to launch these (MANUAL_GATES = {G0, P9, P9b, P10}).
